description: Flexible schema for parsing receipts, invoices, and charges from any provider.

document_number.description: Unique document identifier: invoice number, receipt number, order ID, etc.

date_issued.description: Date the document was issued, ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

date_due.description: Payment due date, ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Relevant for invoices.

date_paid.description: Date payment was made, ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

billing_period.description: Billing period for subscriptions, telco, or utilities.

start.description: Billing period start date, ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

end.description: Billing period end date, ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code, e.g., USD, EUR, ARS.

tax_id.description: VAT number, CUIT, EIN, or equivalent tax identifier.

email.description: The email address of the issuer.

phone.description: The phone number of the issuer.

name.description: The name of the entity being billed.

tax_id.description: Tax ID of the billed entity.

email.description: The email address of the billing entity.

account_number.description: Customer or account number at the provider.

name.description: Specific provider or wallet name, e.g., Mercado Pago, Apple Pay, Visa.

card_last_four.description: Last 4 digits of the card, used for bank reconciliation.

card_brand.description: Card brand: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, etc.

line_items.description: Individual items or charges on the document.

description.description: Description of the item or charge.

unit.description: Unit of measure: unit, kg, L, GB, hour, etc.

unit_price.description: Price per unit in document currency.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this line item.

total.description: Total amount for this line item in document currency.

notes.description: Any notes or comments about this item.

name.description: Tax name or type, e.g., VAT 21%, GST, IVA.

rate.description: Tax rate as a percentage, e.g., 21.0 for 21%.

overall_total.description: Final total after taxes and discounts.

tags.description: Free-form hints inferred from the document, e.g., subscription, monthly, recurring.

notes.description: Any additional remarks or terms on the document.
